description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a dark wood veneer finish and a smooth, white countertop. The front features two large, flat doors with a subtle vertical seam, suggesting a double-door design without visible handles. The sides and back are finished in the same dark wood, with a consistent grain pattern running horizontally. The top surface is flat, wide, and appears to be made of a solid, light-colored material, likely engineered stone or laminate. The cabinet stands on a flat base, with no visible legs or feet, giving it a sturdy and grounded appearance. Its minimalist design and clean lines make it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, dark wood cabinet with a white countertop and two seamless front doors, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, flat doors with a vertical seam and no visible handles beneath a white countertop.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the uninterrupted dark wood panel and the thickness of the white countertop.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a single, wide dark wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the continuous wood grain and countertop edge.
